title: Keep chat route overlays out of the composer lane
description: Hide global update cards, whats-new modals, and the floating usage-meter pill on /chat routes so narrow mobile and desktop chat layouts keep the header and composer usable.

title: Expose active agent count from the chat sister picker
description: Surface the live active-agent count as a compact pill next to the chat agent selector, linking directly into the agent view without expanding the bottom controls.

title: Filter serialized empty assistant payloads in chat history
description: Treat literal assistant null/undefined sentinels from history adapters as absent text while preserving user messages that intentionally contain those words.

title: Clean stale untracked workspace scratch files
description: Review backup files and one-off fix scripts left in the workspace root and chat directories, then either remove them or codify them as tracked utilities.
